rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component names, ports, and connections are authoritative from the input AADL model and must be respected in annex placement
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scoping rules when inserting AGREE annexes
Only place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations as AGREE expressions
